title: Big Globe - Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty Compatibility
description: Big Globe - Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty Compatibility
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-majruszs-progressive-difficulty)

A compatibility mod/datapack that places the [Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty](https://modrinth.com/mod/majruszs-progressive-difficulty) Enderium ore in the generation of [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

It is generated at any height, but it is still difficult to find it as the original, But it can be generated between 1 and 4 minerals simultaneously

![Enderium Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9538c9c9e42d3212a520e2351b7fa6ec45f420d7_0.webp)
